1.premise: ICE can mean frozen road hazard or immigration enforcement, and the "bad kind" is the one entering homes without warrants.
"ICE" can mean frozen road hazard or immigration enforcement.

2.premise: Black crime stereotypes are widely understood about policing but rarely said aloud.

3.premise: Deporting Black people is so physically demanding that agents need elite fitness.

1.premise: Three-gun training is so excessive that it only fits a carjacking during quail hunting.

lines.text: Hope you guys are staying warm, driving safe.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: There's a lot of ice on the road and not just the good kind.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Not just the brave men and women who are trying to make sure these sexy Latinas don't suck her cocks.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But the bad kind that enters your home without a warrant.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: My only problem with ICE is that they're going after every minority group except black people.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I mean, you're trying to reduce crime.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You can just give it more room to breathe.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Can you imagine the shape you have to be
lines.label: setup

lines.text: for the three-gun competition right now.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That's where you shoot a pistol, a rifle,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and a shotgun in under three minutes,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: just in case I get carjacked at an Antifa rally.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: And a flock of quail fly by.
lines.label: tag
